name: App Service does not enforce HTTPS only
description: An Azure App Service or Function App allows HTTP connections. Data transmitted over HTTP is unencrypted and visible to anyone with network access, including session tokens and API keys.
remediation: Enable HTTPS Only on all App Services: Azure Portal → App Service → TLS/SSL settings → HTTPS Only → On. Also set Minimum TLS Version to 1.2. Use Azure Front Door or Application Gateway WAF for additional TLS termination and header security.
